statusDetail: BLOCKED — U1 requires can1357 upstream acceptance in a named commit before this record may become PROPOSED

authorization.reason: The public fork route exists in FORK CREATED / BRANCH PENDING state, but the exact candidate has not been pushed, no can1357 pull request has been opened, and can1357 acceptance in a named commit is not evidenced. The candidate remains draft evidence and does not pass U1. Operator acceptance alone cannot open G0; Node 22.19.0 is also unavailable.

candidate.can1357PublicationAcceptanceEvidence: The local private ref is retention only. The public fork is a named repository handoff route in FORK CREATED / BRANCH PENDING state; the candidate branch was not pushed, no pull request was opened, and no can1357 publication or acceptance is claimed or evidenced.

repositoryIdentityObservation.claimBoundary: This records only the public repository identity, the isFork metadata value, the default branch, and public HEAD/main resolution. It does not claim a specific parent repository relationship.

source.derivation: The candidate is one local commit with exactly ten changed paths on the audited upstream commit.
source.upstreamPublicationOrAcceptanceClaim: No can1357 publication or acceptance is evidenced; the public fork establishes only the bounded branch-pending handoff route.

remoteObservations.claimBoundary: The output did not contain b6e75dbbc545c815786ecc15d155a332c21cad2b because the command queried only public HEAD and main, not that local commit through a public ref. This does not establish absence from every public ref and does not evidence publication or acceptance.
This proves only the public fork HEAD/main resolution at the bounded observation; it does not evidence the candidate through a public branch, a pull request, or can1357 acceptance.

ownerHandleDisclaimer: These draft local roles grant no qualification or integration authority. The operator cannot accept this DRAFT as G0; can1357 upstream acceptance must first exist in a named commit.

u1.entry: The public fork route exists in FORK CREATED / BRANCH PENDING state. Push exact candidate b6e75dbbc545c815786ecc15d155a332c21cad2b to a named fork branch, open a pull request to can1357 upstream, and revalidate the accepted object, parent, tree, exact path/blob inventory, exports, source blobs, and license.
u1.pass: can1357 upstream accepts the complete required seams in a named upstream commit and the evidence is refreshed to that exact identity.
u1.fail: A fork without the exact candidate branch, the local private ref, operator acceptance, a missing object, or identity drift does not pass U1 and cannot authorize G0, G1, or H1.

g0.entry: U1 passes, ADR-OMP-004 is refreshed from DRAFT to PROPOSED for the exact named upstream commit, and all identities are revalidated immediately before acceptance.
g0.pass: operator:user accepts the refreshed proposal naming the exact accepted commit, tree, parent, path/blob inventory, Node 22.19.0 and 24.13.0 lanes, evidence boundary, rollback, and forbidden work.
g0.fail: This DRAFT cannot be accepted. Operator acceptance alone, missing or conditional upstream acceptance, a missing object, or identity drift leaves product activation TERMINATED and prohibits candidate execution.

runtimeReadiness.entry: A future refreshed G0 proposal is accepted
runtimeReadiness.pass: Plain Node 22.19.0 and 24.13.0 runners are both available and their exact executable/version identities are captured.
runtimeReadiness.fail: Either runtime is absent or substituted; G1 and H1 do not start.

g1.entry: G0 passes and runtime readiness passes
evidence: unchanged package-subpath imports on both formal Node lanes
exact commit, tree, manifest blobs, source blobs, commands, executable identities, fixtures, outputs, and digests
static closure and runtime traps for forbidden authority
determinism, deep immutability, typed failures, conflict handling, and zero external mutation
g1.pass: Both seams pass alone, together, unchanged, and without a bundler, loader workaround, polyfill, extraction, bridge, or forbidden runtime authority.
g1.fail: Any failed import, contract, determinism, identity, authority, or evidence check terminates the candidate review.

evidence: unchanged package-subpath import on both formal Node lanes
exact parser and type-source blobs, command lines, fixtures, outputs, and digests
malformed, oversized, Unicode, CRLF/LF, duplicate, conflicting, overlapping, stale-hash, and resource-bound cases
runtime traps and filesystem sentinels proving zero read, write, move, delete, network, process, session, TUI, native, browser, or Bun authority
h1.pass: The direct hashline seam and the combined all-three suite pass unchanged on both formal Node lanes with zero external mutation.
h1.fail: Any semantic, source-binding, runtime, mutation, identity, or evidence failure terminates the candidate review; extraction is not a fallback under this proposal.

integration.entry: Fresh G1 and H1 passes plus a separate accepted integration ADR

actionsBeforeExplicitAcceptance: treat this DRAFT or operator acceptance alone as a G0 pass
start G0 qualification execution before U1 and acceptance of a refreshed PROPOSED record
materialize or modify candidate source in an owner checkout
change vendor, active code, manifests, lockfiles, tests, workspaces, release wiring, or product/release publication state
push a candidate branch or open a pull request without a separate exact authorization
claim can1357 upstream publication or acceptance without evidence

rollback.draftBlockedOrExpired: Start no qualification and leave S0 inert. Its local branch has no configured upstream/tracking ref and no remote publication is claimed or evidenced. The local candidate is not applied to the S0 vendor tree; no runtime or product rollback is required.
rollback.qualificationFailureAfterFutureAcceptanc: Before deleting anything, preserve a durable PASS/FAIL report binding candidate and runtime identities, exact commands, and raw-artifact digests, and verify the stored report and digests. Only then delete disposable worktrees, fixtures, and raw probe output; verify owner and active OMK paths remain unchanged; retain S0 and product activation TERMINATED.
rollback.candidateIdentityDrift: Stop, preserve the prior observation as historical evidence, record a refreshed commit/tree/path/blob/license inventory, and require a refreshed decision. A missing object at required revalidation expires this draft.
rollback.publication: The public fork is a handoff route only and creates no product rollback obligation. No candidate branch was pushed and no pull request was opened, so the recorded state has no candidate-publication rollback. Any later route retirement requires separate authorization; this draft grants no further publication authority.

reconstruction.description: Reconstruct the inventory from the authorized local private ref and local Git object database without checkout, ref mutation, network access, or candidate execution.
reconstruction.objectAvailabilityBoundary: Authorized local private ref refs/omp/candidates/b6e75dbbc545c815786ecc15d155a332c21cad2b durably retains candidate commit b6e75dbbc545c815786ecc15d155a332c21cad2b independent of detached worktree /tmp/omp-u1-pure-seams. The public fork is a branch-pending handoff route only; the local ref does not evidence remote candidate publication or can1357 acceptance.

retained commit b6e75dbbc545c815786ecc15d155a332c21cad2b has tree 296cfdbb83bbb7db30248864938cd7f456e2b8f5 and sole parent 39c95e5e29b1c8b082059f57421ce445c3dffdd4
the exact ten-path mode and parent/candidate blob inventory matches candidate.changedPaths
the LICENSE identity matches blob cc0c5aa7c10d87c5142af1274b37da95c005184d and SHA-256 545636e19386d3d4e0ae6d77354527499999c3ebfbca61b9fa5aa4ead7c0b308

assertions: recorded local private ref still resolves exactly to the retained candidate unless refreshed evidence explicitly supersedes that local identity
candidate or accepted upstream commit object exists
candidate or accepted upstream parent and tree match the refreshed record
exact changed-path count, modes, parent blobs, and candidate blobs match
manifest exports and source/type blobs match
LICENSE blob, bytes, parent equality, and SHA-256 match
revalidation.missingObjectResult: expire this draft; do not open G0
